text_original:
That artful boy !
He will not speak with mef
But for the sake of you, Sir,
Shall I make myself unable to eat ?
That artful boy !
He will not eat with me !
But for the sake of you, Sir,
Shall I make myself unable to rest ?
text_normalized:
That artful boy !
He will not speak with mef
But for the sake of you, Sir,
Shall I make myself unable to eat ?
That artful boy !
He will not eat with me !
But for the sake of you, Sir,
Shall I make myself unable to rest ?
